response.global_analysis: 1. Dialogue & Vocals Match: The conversational part and vocal performance both match the video audio and reference lyrics perfectly. 2. Reference Match: The song 'Yakusoku' matches the provided lyrics reference; timing is carefully synchronized with the vocals. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are precisely aligned to start exactly with vocalizations and are structured to ensure readability and clear translation.

subtitles.original: 強くなれると思う
subtitles.english: I think you can become stronger.

subtitles.original: Yeah!
subtitles.english: Yeah!

subtitles.original: かっこいいね！ おおー！
subtitles.english: That's so cool! Oh wow!

subtitles.original: ラオラ意味深い。Deep meaning! That's cool!
subtitles.english: Raora, that was so deep! Deep meaning! That's cool!

subtitles.original: かっこいい
subtitles.english: Cool.

subtitles.original: かっこいいね！ Cute and cool, Raora.
subtitles.english: So cool! Cute and cool, Raora.

subtitles.original: No, no, no!
subtitles.english: No, no, no!

subtitles.original: You are cool!
subtitles.english: You are cool!

subtitles.original: Everyone here is cool! みんなクール！
subtitles.english: Everyone here is cool! Everyone's cool!

subtitles.original: Team Pink is very cool. Pink is a cool color, okay?
subtitles.english: Team Pink is very cool. Pink is a cool color, okay?

subtitles.original: Well, happy birthday to you.
subtitles.english: Well, happy birthday to you.

subtitles.original: Thank you so much, Mori-sama.
subtitles.english: Thank you so much, Mori-sama.

subtitles.original: お誕生日おめでとう！ Happy birthday!
subtitles.english: Happy birthday! Happy birthday!

subtitles.original: Thank you for singing Brave Shine with me.
subtitles.english: Thank you for singing Brave Shine with me.

subtitles.original: It's a very meaningful song and I really appreciate to have my dai-senpais with me. Thank you so much!
subtitles.english: It's a very meaningful song and I really appreciate to have my great senpais with me. Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: Yeah, of course, old senpais. Old senpais here with you.
subtitles.english: Yeah, of course, old senpais. Old senpais here with you.

subtitles.original: Well, myself and Towa gotta get out of here, but Raora, you keep on keeping on, okay?
subtitles.english: Well, myself and Towa gotta get out of here, but Raora, you keep on keeping on, okay?

subtitles.original: Okay, I'll do my best!
subtitles.english: Okay, I'll do my best!

subtitles.original: Yeah, and we'll see you guys later, okay?
subtitles.english: Yeah, and we'll see you guys later, okay?

subtitles.original: See you guys later!
subtitles.english: See you guys later!

subtitles.original: Bye everybody! See ya! Bye-bye!
subtitles.english: Bye everybody! See ya! Bye-bye!

subtitles.original: 白い世界の中では
subtitles.english: In this white world,

subtitles.original: 時間が止まってゆくような気がした
subtitles.english: it felt like time was stopping.

subtitles.original: いつも見せないような表情が
subtitles.english: That expression you never seemed to show me...

subtitles.original: その距離が 少しだけ愛しかった
subtitles.english: I loved that distance, just a little.

subtitles.original: 巻き戻せないと
subtitles.english: "It can't be rewound,"

subtitles.original: はしゃいでいるその横顔
subtitles.english: you said, looking so cheerful.

subtitles.original: 抱えていた悩みも ちっぽけだ
subtitles.english: Even the troubles I carried felt so small.

subtitles.original: 君に染まる視界が
subtitles.english: This view painted in your colors,

subtitles.original: かじかんでく両手が
subtitles.english: these hands frozen with cold...

subtitles.original: 心から願うよ 終わらせたくなどはないんだと
subtitles.english: I wish from the bottom of my heart that this will never end.

subtitles.original: 思い出の中にはいつも君の姿
subtitles.english: In my memories, you are always there.

subtitles.original: 夢のまま 覚めないまま その笑顔が忘れられないや
subtitles.english: Remaining in a dream from which I can't wake, I can't forget that smile.

subtitles.original: 言葉では足りないようだ 大人になんてなれないよ
subtitles.english: Words don't seem to be enough, and we can't grow up.

subtitles.original: くだらない事ばっか それでも楽しかった
subtitles.english: It was full of meaningless things, but it was still so much fun.

subtitles.original: ずっと今がこのまま続いたらいいね
subtitles.english: "It would be nice if the present could go on forever,"

subtitles.original: なんてさ 僕にはにかんでみせるの 泣きそうな声で
subtitles.english: you said to me with a bashful smile, in a voice that sounded like crying.
